test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Economy, travellers=1,1,1, daysToCheck=5, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+1, return=today+9}

test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Premium Economy, travellers=2,2,1, daysToCheck=6, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+10, return=today+month}

test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Economy, travellers=1,1,1, daysToCheck=5, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+1, return=today+9}

test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Premium Economy, travellers=2,2,1, daysToCheck=6, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+10, return=today+month}
